site.name: Home of Calculators
site.description: Home of Calculators is a complete calculator platform: 500+ free online calculators (math, finance, health, conversion, statistics), a no-code visual builder to design your own, embeddable widgets for any website, and full white-labeling. Free forever, private by design. All math runs in your browser.

calculators.name: Basic Calculator
calculators.description: Simple everyday arithmetic: add, subtract, multiply, divide with a retro LCD display.
